files_changed.reason: Catalog's public API (Get/Put/Delete) offers no way to hold a fileID's stripe lock across a read-then-conditional-write sequence; CAS must live inside catalog.go to be race-free.
wires 2a.1.1's durable WriteVersion together with the new CAS, with a retry loop on CAS failure, per acceptance criteria.

files_changed.change: added TestCurrentVersionCAS, newTestCatalog helper, countVersionFiles helper

files_not_changed: engine/catalog/record.go (CurrentVersion field already existed, no schema change needed)
engine/wal/* (WAL wiring explicitly deferred; out of impacted-modules scope for 2a.1.2)
risk: low — additive methods only, no changes to existing Put/Get/Delete/WriteVersion behavior or signatures
regression_surface: engine/catalog (new method only, no existing method bodies touched), engine/mvcc (new method only)
